title: The eyes have it
wikitext:
[]: The eyes have it             Quote Post by Iblis 19th Angel » Thu Aug 11, 2005 9:48 am Sorry if this has been asked before, but if the Evas are all supposed to be clones of Adam, why do they have a different number of eyes? 01, 03 & 04 have two eyes like Adam, but 00 has 1, 02 has 4, 05 has none & the first botched pre-00 prototype has 5! What's up with that?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Aug 11, 2005 10:05 am i'm sure that reichu will have a more relevant answer, but I know that clones dont all look the same as their "parents", due to a variety of variables that control appearance. Mind you, 00 and 01 were called prototypes for a reason...

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Aug 11, 2005 12:07 pm I thought eva unit 1 was a clone from lilith and the others were from what ever was left of adam. and they have different eyes cus the basically edited them to make them better. but in unit-0's case they had a lack of technology to make 2 eyes that connected to the plugs.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Thu Aug 11, 2005 12:32 pm TheBlueTree wrote: I thought Eva unit 1 was a clone from Lilith

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Thu Aug 11, 2005 1:23 pm Soluzar wrote: That's what makes Eva-01 different, and they never really explained what effect it had on her.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Aug 11, 2005 1:42 pm I agree with Ryo, but I haven't ever heard such teory like the Soluzar one :shock: Lilith is the mother of the 01 for you?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Aug 11, 2005 2:45 pm Watch the NPCs, HS. ("Director's Cuts") It's because they needed a cyclops for good measure, and four eyes just look kooky. :)

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Thu Aug 11, 2005 6:39 pm What Hexon says is true. Also I think it is the Seven Eye theory. In total EVA units 00,01,02 have 7 eyes. The 7 eyes of GOD. I Also think that lilith has 7 eyes. If you search the forum, we discussed this theory previously.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Aug 11, 2005 7:35 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: Watch the NPCs, HS. ("Director's Cuts")

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Aug 11, 2005 7:49 pm New Production Cuts. It's more accurate than "Director's Cuts" because the latter tends to refer to material that was originally produced to air with the series but was edited out for time. These, IMUIC, were simply "The New Shit".

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Thu Aug 11, 2005 11:04 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: I agree with Ryo, but I haven't ever heard such teory like the Soluzar one :shock: Lilith is the mother of the 01 for you?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Aug 11, 2005 11:15 pm I never felt very comfortable with that. They name Eva-01 having the same relationship with Lilith as Kaworu says Eva-02 has with Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Thu Aug 11, 2005 11:30 pm AchtungAffen wrote: I never felt very comfortable with that. They name Eva-01 having the same relationship with Lilith as Kaworu says Eva-02 has with Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Aug 11, 2005 11:46 pm It is what I believe, but it's not a question of faith. The evidence never convinced me of the Adam link. Reichu said the opening, but that doesn't seem like much evidence to me, firstly, because it's out of the eva "universe", and it's only one image after the other. And the similarity argument about Eva-01 looking like the other Evas also doesn't convince me as original Adam (as in its discovery) and Lilith don't look very much difference (if you take out the little legs, mask and the lance on Adam). The "it was Adam" line on 23 and the background image also doesn't seem like evidence enough to me because of the generality of the statement, and because Lilith never existed in Eva until 24. I mean, it was never named until 24. There is not, in my oppinion, a single direct link (be it quote or image) about the Eva-01 and Adam link. But there's a direct link on Eva-01 and Lilith link, the 25' SEELE quote, which if taken on the light of Kaworu's affirmation about Eva-02 being Adam's bunshin, and Eva-01 being Lilith's bunshin (25' - SEELE), seems to imply a similar relation between those Evas and their respective SoL. Also, the 23' image of Lilith and Eva-01 stuck by the waist, confirmed by the liner notes of the respective Genesis DVD (not ADV of course, original Japanese), seems to confirm the same. You can have this debate in respect with me. I like debating Eva ideas, with respect of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Fri Aug 12, 2005 12:35 am AchtungAffen wrote: The similarity argument about Eva-01 looking like the other Evas also doesn't convince me as original Adam (as in its discovery) and Lilith don't look very much different.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 12, 2005 3:20 am STOP A SEC.! What are you talink' about? What is it this DC of EVA-01 and Lilith? Can you post an image? I've watched just the DC version, I haven't ever seen this cutted materials!

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Fri Aug 12, 2005 6:23 am [url]http://www.evamonkey.com/test_type/[/url] Look at images 3 trough 5.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Fri Aug 12, 2005 7:47 am WHERE THE HELL DID THEY COME FROM!?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 12, 2005 10:18 am I'm the fooler man in the world, you know. I've seen them, but for the low qulity of the VHS I haven' t noticed Lilith(and on the DVD they cutted these scenes out, as I said somewhere.... I'm sad....). It's a Director's Cut scene. Thank you Ryo! You're kind! So Lilith is the mum of EVA-01, it's official XD

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Fri Aug 12, 2005 1:44 pm Given what evidence exists and what we can reasonably infer we know that at a minimum : 1) Eva Unit 01 was birthed from Lilith (as the DC images attest to as well as the commentary by Seele); what we do not know is whether Lilith contributed any genetic material or whether she was simply a surrogate for Adam's DNA 2) Eva 01 is the only Eva to have this kind of relationship to Lilith, again, as the quote from Seele indicates. 3) It is unlikley that the other Units were "birthed" from Adam the same way that 01 was from Lilith because Adam is shrunk down to an embryonic state, presumably during 2nd Impact (although the actual events of 2nd impact are a bit fuzzy, but from DC 23' it appears that Adam eventually was restrained by the LoL and then, presumably, reverted to an embryonic state) 4) At a minimum, Unit 02 is a genetic mate of Adam's, since Kaworu can control her in ep. 24. We can further assume that Unit 00 is also a clone of Adam simply because, again, Seele notes that 01 is the only offspring of Lilith (that is, of course, except for humans :) ). We can assume Units 03 and 04 are similarly clones of Adam and not Lilith given Seele's quote and the fact that they appear to have been developed in locations other than Tokyo 3 (Adam has been at other locations--after he was discovered in the White Moon; Lilith apparently has always remained in the Black Moon, so while they could have mixed some DNA these Evas were not birthed directly from Lilith. But again, we cannot be sure about this) The unknown (not unlikely, just unknown) is whether Eva 01 contains Adam's DNA. Now certainly we cannot ignore the resemblance of 01 and Adam. However, just because they look alike does not mean they are genetic clones. Of all the creatures Adam supposedly gave rise to, the Evas are the only ones that actually resemble each other, and this was not the product of natural processes but rather the genetic engineering of Gehirn/Seele. While one can reasonably argue that it is possible that 01 is genetically linked to Adam we cannot say there is enough evidence to put the matter to rest. In a similar fashion, Kaworu physically resembles humans, but he is not the offspring of Lilith, but of Adam. His appearence was the result of Seele's deliberate manipulation of Kaworu. So it is possible that they did the same thing with Unit 01--he was a genetic clone of Lilith but manipulated to look like an offspring of Adam--but this is pure speculation since, again, we just don't have enough evidence to say so definitively either way. Both seem plausible IMO. Any thoughts? And where the hell is Reichu, she can certainly articulate the Lilith-as-surrogate theory better than anyone...

What's up with that?
